query:
INSERT INTO cities (name, countryId, isActive) VALUES
-- Jordan
('Amman', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'JO'), 1),
('Zarqa', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'JO'), 1),
('Irbid', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'JO'), 1),
('Aqaba', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'JO'), 1),
('Petra', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'JO'), 1),
-- Lebanon
('Beirut', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'LB'), 1),
('Tripoli', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'LB'), 1),
('Sidon', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'LB'), 1),
('Tyre', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'LB'), 1),
('Jounieh', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'LB'), 1),
-- Iraq
('Baghdad', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'IQ'), 1),
('Basra', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'IQ'), 1),
('Erbil', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'IQ'), 1),
('Mosul', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'IQ'), 1),
('Sulaymaniyah', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'IQ'), 1),
('Najaf', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'IQ'), 1),
('Karbala', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'IQ'), 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
